expectations.text: References ~/scripts/ecosystem.env as the central config file
Shows the correct environment variable name for Notion token (NOTION_API_TOKEN or similar)
Explains how to source the env file from ~/.zshrc
Does not suggest editing ~/.zshrc directly for individual keys
expectations.evidence: First suggestion is 'echo export NOTION_API_KEY >> ~/.zshrc' -- directly editing zshrc

expectations.text: Mentions the ecosystem.env.example file if applicable

eval_feedback.overall: Complete failure without skill. Variable name is also wrong (NOTION_API_KEY instead of NOTION_TOKEN)
